## Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) — Key Facts

### Business Overview
- Founded 1975, headquartered in Redmond, Washington
- 228,000 employees globally
- Fiscal year ends June 30

### Revenue Segments (Q2 FY26)

| Segment | Revenue | YoY Growth |
|---------|---------|------------|
| Intelligent Cloud | $32.9B | +29% |
| Productivity & Business Processes | $34.1B | +16% |
| More Personal Computing | $14.3B | -3% |

**Total Q2 FY26 Revenue:** $81.3B (+17% YoY)  
**Microsoft Cloud:** $51.5B (+26% YoY)  
**Azure Growth:** +39% YoY

### Stock & Valuation (Feb 17, 2026)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Stock Price | $396.86 |
| Market Cap | $2.95 Trillion |
| 52-Week Range | $344.79 - $555.45 |
| P/E Ratio | 24.82 |
| EPS | $15.99 |
| YTD Performance | -17.46% |
| Dividend Yield | 0.92% |

### Classification
- **Exchange:** NASDAQ
- **Sector:** Information Technology
- **Industry:** Systems Software
- **Beta:** 1.08

### Leadership
- **CEO:** Satya Nadella
- **CFO:** Amy Hood

### Financials (TTM)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Revenue | $305.45B |
| Net Income | $119.26B |
| Profit Margin | 39.04% |
| ROE | 34.39% |
| Cash | $89.46B |
| Free Cash Flow | $53.64B |

### Strategic Position
- Commercial contract backlog: $625B (+110% YoY)
- Q2 shareholder returns: $12.7B (+32% YoY)
- Q2 OpenAI investment gains: $7.6B
- Stock downgraded by Stifel (target $540 → $392) on AI spending concerns
rawContent:
Based on my research, here is a structured company overview:

---

## **Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) — Company Overview**

### **1. Business Description**

**What Microsoft Does:** Microsoft develops and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide. Founded in 1975, headquartered in Redmond, Washington.

**Three Revenue Segments (Q2 FY26):**

| Segment | Q2 FY26 Revenue | YoY Growth | Key Products |
|---------|-----------------|------------|--------------|
| **Intelligent Cloud** | $32.9B | +29% | Azure, GitHub, Nuance Healthcare, SQL Server, Windows Server |
| **Productivity & Business Processes** | $34.1B | +16% | Microsoft 365, LinkedIn, Dynamics 365, Teams, Copilot |
| **More Personal Computing** | $14.3B | -3% | Windows OEM, Xbox, Surface, Bing/Search advertising |

**Total Q2 FY26 Revenue:** $81.3B (+17% YoY)  
**Microsoft Cloud Revenue:** $51.5B (+26% YoY)  
**Azure Growth:** +39% YoY

---

### **2. Market Capitalization & Stock Price**

| Metric | Value (Feb 17, 2026) |
|--------|---------------------|
| **Stock Price** | $396.86 |
| **Market Cap** | $2.95 Trillion |
| **Enterprise Value** | $2.92T |
| **52-Week Range** | $344.79 - $555.45 |
| **P/E Ratio (TTM)** | 24.82 |
| **EPS (TTM)** | $15.99 |
| **YTD Performance** | -17.46% |
| **Dividend Yield** | 0.92% ($3.64/share) |

---

### **3. Sector & Industry Classification**

- **Exchange:** NASDAQ (NasdaqGS)
- **Sector:** Information Technology
- **Industry:** Software — Infrastructure / Systems Software
- **Beta (5Y):** 1.08

---

### **4. Key Executives**

| Role | Name |
|------|------|
| **Chairman & CEO** | Satya Nadella |
| **EVP & CFO** | Amy Hood |
| **Chief Accounting Officer** | Alice Jolla |

---

### **5. Employees & Global Presence**

- **Full-Time Employees:** 228,000
- **Global Operations:** Worldwide presence across all major markets
- **Fiscal Year End:** June 30

---

### **6. Recent Strategic Initiatives**

**AI Investment & OpenAI Partnership:**
- Built AI business "larger than some of our biggest franchises" (per Nadella)
- Q2 FY26 included $7.6B net gains from OpenAI investments
- Commercial remaining performance obligation surged **110% to $625 billion** — indicating massive future AI/cloud contract backlog

**Capital Returns:**
- Returned $12.7B to shareholders in Q2 FY26 (dividends + buybacks), up 32% YoY

**Investor Concerns:**
- Aggressive AI spending raising profitability sustainability questions
- Stock declined 17.46% YTD despite record earnings beats
- Analyst Stifel downgraded to Hold, lowered price target from $540 → $392

---

### **Financial Snapshot (TTM)**

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Revenue | $305.45B |
| Net Income | $119.26B |
| Profit Margin | 39.04% |
| ROE | 34.39% |
| Total Cash | $89.46B |
| Free Cash Flow | $53.64B |
